
(APPENDIX) 附录 {-}
===================
9.29Hz巡回演唱会歌单 {#playlists}
===================

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.cap='2024周深9.29Hz巡回演唱会歌单 【@929hz-playlists】'}
knitr::include_graphics(rep("img/playlists/playlists.png"))
```

***

```{asis, echo=!knitr::is_latex_output()}
::: {.infobox .panda-pang-mi}
**温馨提示：** [点击查看表格源文件](https://docs.qq.com/sheet/DQnljT2JpaVVqRWhC?tab=BB08J2)
:::

```
